textByHash.0b15d540e2c075d1a265d680d9f0ad25156b0952: It might not be so simple! You'll need an amulet of ghostspeak to talk to him!
textByHash.1b164b8c0e22ba684b73f5928cbf0fedc44a2c06: Ok. Just don't lose it again!
textByHash.2045b0876d70cf0d6a27df6d3b8828cbfb6032eb: Well I would give you the letter if you had space to carry it.
textByHash.23a12104b86049df42a2d08a84a9c1ddc7b5f3df: Look, you can see how the sentence structure and grammar evolved from the...
textByHash.29d889a12ce7a4a1aa30f11e556f2c8f81b11a6b: Perhaps he will give you another one.
textByHash.2d9d12cc93f7657f17b5c47e23da539fd4fba806: Oh, right! That explains the mild insanity. No problem; hand over the document and I'll have a look
textByHash.2ec7f791641e807b78ced188b63453868f29949d: Oh thank you so much, you really are my saviour!
textByHash.349cac6cc9eda3c4e4d6d27b156be95df0f42938: He isn't the easiest person to talk to, so you may need to speak to his brother, Blanin, first.
textByHash.360cb87b124e18a1aaa8ab4d83cd68487f6e9ba1: Any time soon would be great.
textByHash.372768be4834146d9adfc0b221ba0fea78fb2f2e: Hmph. It seems this text pertains to a great battle between the temple of Saradomin and something called the Mahey'ish Medron.
textByHash.3a11ba25e2f977449e8de6edbbf5857fbe33db60: You should feel it, and it will guide you to where you need to go.
textByHash.3c778a425260c292d2fe284cf096ea34e69acf30: It seems you're lucky he didn't beat you up! Well done, that's another piece of the puzzle.
textByHash.45809f261745dc3f7ed40e45f1fa04643cb1a7e4: It's an early variation on a script used by the priests of Saradomin a long time ago.
textByHash.4b66e0a055701a1a24dfe1aaabca6ee65d9e5111: this outpost with a group of others to cause havoc for the city of Ardougne. The people of the city called upon some Saradomin followers, who happened to be led by the other friend. A battle ensued that ended with the
textByHash.51fd262541494ad0f7c5bd90714374e048ec7ef5: Well, actually nobody knows what the history is. But there must be something.
textByHash.5ad83fe81bbc73aca3dc1686c5e4ad669e13397e: You should make some room for it before I can give you it.
textByHash.61870b56d96c9f5addaac44e6c1a7194ecc8b4fd: I can now continue with my plans for this place. Thank you.
textByHash.76aacb35401e874a672d5942a2a469aba980f2f6: Hurrah! Good work, you've done it. You've saved the outpost!
textByHash.79bc570a33e60c64dee1a3e4103e682ed3fa19fe: His Great Grandfather lived in this outpost according to the records. He must know something!
textByHash.7d003beaf1c23f591a83ecdf6a928eddafe889c7: Thanks for the help again. Feel free to browse the room next door!
textByHash.7d44b6ec2e017f6324212fddebb492a00d750fe8: If all goes well, I hope to be able to turn it into a museum as a monument to the area's history. What do you think?
textByHash.7d73e8223793cbf9768e49f7b09b2946c0d5962b: Mahey'sh Medron. I think it's a corruption of an even earlier language and actually refers to something called Mother Mallum.
textByHash.7f0f2aa111839612c25123e770a179d8e2adff65: Good work. Let's see what it says.
textByHash.800d529e71990772650e4777ea26855ff6a85208: two ex-friends at the top of the outpost as the sole survivors. Realising their mistakes they made friends again. One decided to become King and spread the word of equality, and the other chose to start up a
textByHash.855e96c5707044a101e8805e3c1726e9e41e1786: Possibly, I am very busy you see and my services don't come cheap.
textByHash.857c3382d98431317b20ccbcb49a5ccf51df5abc: Be careful with it, the raw magic can damage you unexpectedly when you feel it.
textByHash.85b5574869a41748b1e0fbf35688852388eebac1: Stop! I can't help you unless you help me out first.
textByHash.8d7b843781b6f3908ea3ad2a4a66f4e55512b34a: Take a look at the artefacts in the new museum room. You may find something of interest.
textByHash.8fd990812f57d1fc2c597862a55d0d3e3194de13: Wait a minute. You could help me!
textByHash.92c275ee12756063d1c1a6c1ef6c5eb953f5650d: Well, I am very busy, but I could fit you in sometime next month.
textByHash.993edcc0db7e4328253762b819e9bd0dfd4672f0: The person who wrote the journal spent time living in the outpost, following the order of Zamorak.
textByHash.9a8cad2f9aec7120677cc55b264bc61f55c181e2: What do you mean? You've discovered nothing!
textByHash.9cd766b0d39b3621d18996fd29d9aec12fada13b: Have you taken that letter to King Lathas in Ardougne yet?
textByHash.9f2361273d752b98b4b82701c1e7f8e7e65b7683: Riiiight. Okay. What does this err, voice, want you to do?
textByHash.a1f9b3f8336c30712efa76e4537b60404f5dde41: Ah, well the enchanted key can lead you to treasure. The magical nature of the key heats it up or cools it down, depending on your proximity to the treasure.
textByHash.a4d060632892c9a4657b2afd2eff63dff154427e: Well, what I'll do is write down the details you have provided in a more easy to digest manner, along with my plans for using this building as a museum.
textByHash.b319f499f4857c3b3467fbfba87b9328a711967b: Hah! I am the foremost historian in the world.
textByHash.b76cd0ac50cf6b392aa5775b9ebb353e1f44c3fb: He isn't directly, but he's studied many wars, and as this used to be an outpost it should have been involved in some war.
textByHash.ba9d929bab974a2670f09261e688e0231b4eed8c: Any time. I recommend a doctor for those voices, though.
textByHash.bd22d825accf9535e1a91769f4990a181a5be445: Very interesting. So there was a great battle at the outpost. Then one of the survivors became king, and the other started the market place. Good work.
textByHash.c0782482ad72b9c49a4cfe4b1bd01ac4e3ea4ae8: That strange device will guide you in the same way the key did. Feel it, but be careful as it is very powerful. Good luck.
textByHash.c0bb66f2c0d9dd9f61353b70ce33a041ea7ef976: There are three people that may be able to help:
textByHash.c342ce20cbe55e38358072a28a6467f61dfdfc72: What can I do for you ?
textByHash.c6dffca1d132e0131080cecd7c1ec8805191aec0: There is a silver trader in East Ardougne called Erin, who I believe can help.
textByHash.c7a39c3b48028e6a3825857c927012335bbcec0c: Yes! Uncover the history of this building to convince King Lathas to leave it alone. Do you want to know more?
textByHash.c888c426b8efc91a4255ba7ecaf1847b5442a1af: Well, there isn't a whole lot more. They managed to trap the Mother Mallum behind a mystical prison where she was to wait for all time.
textByHash.cb74df20461d68212e31ae52141975202f332cdb: He talks of all the nasty things they did to the people of Ardougne, which I don't care to mention! It looks like they were stopped by someone. But it doesn't say who.
textByHash.d042f0627e68700ef7e223f4f256e6d303703fff: I'm afraid not. You see, I have this ongoing series of texts that need to be catalogued as soon as possible.
textByHash.d4f0b16704e5277b5b14498c3a5251096b1d3e7a: Well, run along and fetch it then.
textByHash.d684cc6b9383f6681da30b13e84f40e5cb5f40ca: It's to be ripped apart to make way for King Lathas' new alchemists' lab.
textByHash.d8589d98c4c835ae057d958d4edca48104465d8a: Well this should function much the same, the deeper magic of the key itself is stored within this strange device.
textByHash.d9cdbcd714b5ac40297d13ac55f0e562ae2fd2f6: Ah! Remember that enchanted key you had to use previously?
textByHash.da4bdb012a37e194594c5f5a6c2b0c0344ec9560: Up near the mountains, in Rellekka is a warrior called Dron whom I have spoken to in the past. He is always on the lookout for information that can improve his fighting and commanding skills.
textByHash.de7c2620826bfb220217ad5720e5276021af77b1: Just look around you! This great building will soon be in ruin.
textByHash.e7be65345cdd48f18481e03615be3f9a479a18fc: Many years ago, there were two friends who fell out over their difference of opinion in religion. One decided to dedicate his life to Saradomin, the other to Zamorak. Years passed and the follower of Zamorak moved into
textByHash.e872cd999e7f2b076a7028dc1b7084acb794abb3: It all makes sense now, I never realised there was quite so much history to this place, it was more than I could have hoped.
textByHash.e9a15d55e567627bd5fd3490321af1c500be8ce2: Excuse me, but are you talking to your backpack?
textByHash.f2555b14231d90a03488bd00d9eb120b3a91a860: I've been told that there's a ghost far off in Port Phasmatys that moans of losing his life to this place.
textByHash.f816862d249da67c3442f44aac2fa1070f526187: Of course! This building has a history spanning generations!
textByHash.f8a068bb3efaeac5bc095a4f2e49762be48d4bff: Don't bother, you're not experienced enough to help me!
textByHash.ff5e804cb3bdd22a6c237bd5f91a9774c1367bf6: market where all could trade their wares equally and fairly. The one that became king is the great grandfather of the King Lathas that we know!
